DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY JASON LUNDBERG IN SUPPORT FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 68756375) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMOS CAMEY, CARLOS HUMBERTO

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES OF DEFENDANT ARMANDO ISIDRO MEJIA AND ZINDER JANITORIAL CO. TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS - NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES OF DEFENDANT ARMANDO ISIDRO MEJIA AND ZINDER JANITORIAL CO., TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE; AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, AND MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. VERIFIED, OBJECTION-FREE RESPONSES AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS (IF APPLICABLE) ARE TO BE SERVED WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. SEE CCP SECTION 2023.040. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER, IN WORD FORMAT, REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING, APPROVED AS TO FORM, AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM CATALANOTTI AT PETER.CATALANOTTI@WILSONELSER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN / M. GOODMAN; NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Form Interrogatories, Set No. Two; Plaintiffs Request For Sanctions; Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And, Declaration Of Jason Lundberg

Motion To Compel Responses Of Defendant Armando Isidro Mejia And Zinder Janitorial Co. To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production, Set One, And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CARLOS RAMOS CAMEY'S Motion To Compel Responses Of Defendant Armando Isidro Mejia And Zinder Janitorial Co. To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production, Set One, And Monetary Sanctions

No appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.
The motion is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Compel Responses of Defendant Armando Isidro Mejia and Zinder Janitorial Co., to Form Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories, Set One; and Request for Production of Documents, Set One, and Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Verified, objection-free responses and responsive documents (if applicable) are to be served within two weeks of notice of this order. The request for sanctions is denied. See CCP Section 2023.040.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order, in Word format, repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling, approved as to form, and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Catalanotti at Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: R. Sahatjian / M. Goodman; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
